summary: End-to-end test of Insurance Benefits Summarizer. Backend pytest suite: 16/16 passed (auth, analyze with real Claude call, CRUD, Excel export). Frontend Playwright: login (wrong+correct PIN), drag/drop file upload, disabled analyze without files, analyze flow with real LLM (xlsx upload), 6 benefit tabs render, export button, history sidebar populates, logout clears token and redirects to /login. All core flows working.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 260: logger is referenced inside run_llm_extraction but defined below at module bottom (line 481). Works because function runs later, but a syntax-error path hit at module load would fail. Consider moving logger setup before routes.

server.py line 390: /api/analyses/{id}/export accepts token only via query string, bypassing the Depends(require_auth) dependency. Works as intended for browser download, but any typo in token still returns 401 only via InvalidTokenError — ExpiredSignatureError is NOT caught and would raise uncaught exception. Suggest adding except ExpiredSignatureError -> 401.
server.py line 327-344: analyses.insert_one(dict(doc)) mutates doc with Mongo _id. Subsequent doc.pop('_id', None) correctly strips it from response. OK.

Dashboard.jsx exportToExcel uses window.open(exportUrl) which embeds JWT in URL query — fine for internal tool but JWT will land in server access logs and browser history. Consider blob-based download via axios responseType='blob' with Authorization header.
No rate limiting on /api/auth/pin — brute force possible on a 10-digit PIN. Low priority for internal tool but worth noting.
seed_data_creation: Created /tmp/test_benefits.xlsx for frontend upload testing; one analysis created and deleted by pytest suite; one created by frontend flow (remains in DB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Uses BASE_URL=REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and APP_PIN from backend/.env via conftest. The analyze test makes a real Claude Sonnet 4.5 call via Emergent key (~30-60s). Frontend data-testids are complete and reliable. Export endpoint needs token as query param.
